title: wow-harness metrics jsonl field allowlist
description: Allowed top-level fields for every line in .wow-harness/state/metrics/*.jsonl. scan_verify_artifacts.py --metrics rejects any line containing a key not listed here. Tightening this allowlist is the primary defense against accidental PII / SECRET leakage via metrics sinks (v2 patch_4 / security P1#4).

ts.description: Event timestamp (ISO-8601 string or epoch-seconds number).

event.description: Short event name, e.g. guard_fired / hook_failed / rebaseline_required.

stage.description: Claude Code hook stage (PreToolUse / PostToolUse / SessionStart / ...).

tool.description: Tool name if applicable (Edit / Write / Bash / Task / ...).

matcher.description: Hook matcher that routed the event.

file_path.description: Relative path of the edited / read file, if applicable.

category.description: Sanitize category (SECRET / TRADE_SECRET / PII / NETWORK / PROTOCOL_INTERNAL).

reason.description: Short human-readable reason; must not contain raw secret material.
